name: Coda
description: Coda is a document collaboration platform that combines spreadsheets, docs, and automation in one place. Use this API to programmatically manage documents, access tables and rows, and automate workflows across your Coda workspace.

capabilities.name: list_docs
capabilities.description: List all documents accessible to the authenticated user, including metadata like name, owner, creation date, and timestamps.

capabilities.name: get_table
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific table in a document, including columns, field types, and configuration.

capabilities.name: list_rows
capabilities.description: Fetch rows from a table with optional filtering, sorting, and field selection. Supports pagination for large datasets.

capabilities.name: insert_rows
capabilities.description: Add one or more new rows to a table with specified column values. Supports batch operations and cell-level data insertion.

capabilities.name: update_row
capabilities.description: Modify an existing row in a table by updating specific column values while preserving other data.

capabilities.name: list_pages
capabilities.description: Retrieve all pages within a document, including their hierarchy, names, and metadata.
